calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2003 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez
Appearances:
Katarina Rost, Esq. for Plaintiff University of San Francisco and Plaintiff's witness, Ray Rogers present, were sworn & examined.
No appearance by Defendant.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant:
Principal of $4,784.63
Attorney's fees of $2,372.96
Costs of $181.00
Interest of $808.78 For the total of $8,147.37.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Continued To Sep-04-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Katarina Rost, Esq. for Plaintiff USF.
Raymond Rogers, the Student Loan Coordinator is also present, was sworn & examined.
Plaintiff's request for a continuance is granted.
Matter is continued to Sept. 4, 2003 at 09:00 am.
